commands.repair_reason: No automated repair is needed; the branch already contains the narrow code/test fix and supplied proof, so the next action is ordinary maintainer review and CI.; Cleared: No security or supply-chain regression found; the diff only changes auth-store runtime snapshot handling and focused tests, without persisting the external OAuth credential to disk. commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a runtime-safe auth-profile save path and regression coverage so runtime-only external CLI OAuth profiles remain in active snapshots while staying out of persisted auth files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main builds a disk-filtered `localStore` and writes that same store back to the active runtime snapshot. I did not run a live gateway reproduction in this read-only review.
